factors.summary: Overall demand is growing, driven by increased sales volume and organic growth.

evidence.text: Total revenue increased 9.7% for the three months ended February 29, 2016 over the same period in the prior fiscal year, from $1,108.8 million to $1,216.1 million. Revenue increased organically by 6.8% as a result of increased sales volume.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is accelerating, driven by increased sales volume.

evidence.text: Revenue increased organically by 6.8% as a result of increased sales volume.

factors.summary: Unit volumes are growing, contributing to revenue growth.

evidence.text: Revenue growth was driven by many factors including new business sold by sales representatives and penetration of additional products and services into existing customers.

factors.summary: The First Aid and Safety Services segment is growing fastest, driven by organic growth and acquisitions.

evidence.text: First Aid and Safety Services reportable operating segment revenue increased 49.8% for the three months ended February 29, 2016. Revenue increased organically by 11.9% as a result of increased sales volume. The remaining 37.9% difference in growth rates represents growth derived through acquisitions, primarily the ZEE acquisition.

factors.summary: Gross margins are improving, driven by lower energy costs and operational efficiency.

evidence.text: The gross margin was 70 basis points higher than the prior fiscal year’s third quarter gross margin of 43.3%. Lower energy-related expenses increased gross margin by 50 basis points. The remaining increase was driven by increased revenue from existing customers and continuous improvement in process efficiency.

factors.summary: The company has been active in acquisitions, with the ZEE Medical Inc. acquisition contributing to growth.

evidence.text: On August 1, 2015, the Company acquired all of the shares of ZEE Medical Inc. (ZEE), a first aid, safety, training and emergency products business that is included in the First Aid and Safety Services reportable operating segment.
